name: Twisted Wonderland
description:
This is a WIP

As per the rules, all characters will be 18+! Ortho is not included.

Welcome to the world of Twisted Wonderland! Interact with its characters and create a story of your own. Be whoever you want to be! Are you the prefect/Yuu? Do you have magic? Play your cards and see where your journey takes you.
creator: FreakingToast
